metadata.seed: Everytime I try to hang myself I stop... I want to die. Why do I keep stopping myself right before... why... why

patient.query: Everytime I try to hang myself I stop... I want to die. Why do I keep stopping myself right before... why... why

automatic_thoughts: Why do I keep stopping myself

llm_response.response: When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?

validate_and_reflect.response: It sounds incredibly difficult to be experiencing these thoughts, and I want to acknowledge how much pain you must be in. Can you tell me a bit more about what it feels like when you find yourself stopping yourself?

socratic_questioning.response: When you say that, it sounds like you're really struggling with these thoughts. Can you tell me what keeps you from acting on them?

alternative_perspective.response: When you say that, I'm really concerned about how much pain you're in. Can you tell me why you stop yourself before you go through with it?

safety_check.response: When you said that, were you having any thoughts of hurting yourself or not wanting to be here?
